n: Múl Kholuim, The Keeper of Books

steps.t: Múl Kholuim has his camp inside a ruin in some high hills south of the large lake in Imlad Balchorth, west from Myrkworth. Birgir has asked you to fin…
Birgir is at Myrkworth, north-east from Múl Kholuim's camp. Having defeated Múl Kholuim, you should return to Birgir.
